title: juncus tenuis subsp. dudleyi
intro: Juncus tenuis subsp. dudleyi, also known as Dudley's rush, is a subspecies of Juncus tenuis, a type of rush that belongs to the family Juncaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Juncus tenuis subsp. dudleyi include its ability to reduce swelling and promote wound healing, as well as its potential to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be used to prepare herbal infusions and decoctions, which are often used to make teas and tonics that support respiratory health and immune function.
